publishedAbstract: - Added taint to nodes result into below alerts for daemonsets `csi-cephfsplugin` and `csi-rbdplugin`: ~~~ description = 10 Pods of DaemonSet openshift-storage/csi-cephfsplugin are running where they are not supposed to run. description = 10 Pods of DaemonSet openshift-storage/csi-rbdplugin are running where they are not supposed to run. ~~~
publishedTitle: Error : "csi-cephfsplugin are running where they are not supposed to run" after adding custom taints in RHOCP 4
